extDescription.message: Prepare a video link and open ChatGPT Video Fact-Check or free Gemini — no API keys.

sidepanelSubtitle.message: We open a free chat you already know. You paste and send.

step1.message: We prepare the video link (and captions when available).

step2.message: Open Video Fact-Check GPT or free Gemini.

step3.message: Paste (Ctrl+V) in the chat and send.

sidepanelHint.message: No developer setup. Use your normal ChatGPT or Google login. Captions + auto-copy come in the next steps.

optionsSubtitle.message: Which free chat should be the default?
